ogTitle: Moa Island vs Moffatdale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moa Island and Moffatdale.
heading: Moa Island vs Moffatdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moa Island, Queensland and Moffatdale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moa Island and Moffatdale have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Moa Island or Moffatdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moa Island has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Moffatdale scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moa Island scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Moffatdale scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moa Island or Moffatdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moa Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
